data.name: Yet Another Hentai Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
Description

Yet Another Hentai Puzzle game to keep you in a good mood.
It's a game where you swap pieces to complete a beautiful image.
It contains 30 unique uncensored levels, and you'll not find any clothes here, so be prepared.

Game Features

  • Beautiful art
  • Relaxing music
  • You can beat the game with one hand

Steam Features

  • Achievements
  • Steam Cloud so you can play anywhere (except from a workplace)

data.short_description: Yet Another Hentai Puzzle game to keep you happy.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or Higher
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.0 or Higher
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any main distro from 2001 or earlier
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
